arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca to serve one-game touchline ban after being booked celebrating Pedro Neto's late winner against Fulham
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca will serve a one-match touchline suspension after Chelsea's head coach picked up his third yellow card of the season while celebrating Sunday's dramatic late victory over Fulham.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's giant task as Barca inflict pain again
arts.sum: Chelsea are used to winning in England but when it comes to facing Barcelona in Europe, the shoe is on the other foot. Can they turn things around?

arts.ttl: Chelsea dressing room breaks silence amid Frank Lampard chants during Fulham win
arts.sum: Chelsea's matchwinner against Fulham Pedro Neto has spoken about how he understands the supporters' frustrations after pro-Frank Lampard chants were heard at Craven Cottage this afternoon. With Chelsea still trailing, their travelling supporters burst into pro-Lampard chants which suggested the fans would prefer the legend to return for a third spell in charge.

arts.ttl: £52m player's Chelsea career could be over after win vs Fulham as Enzo Maresca makes brutal claim
arts.sum: Not looking good for his future...

arts.ttl: It's OVER! Maresca reveals fate of Chelsea star after brutal snub
arts.sum: George’s introduction left Chelsea without a recognised striker after Maresca left Christopher Nkunku out of his matchday squad and the Blues boss said after the game: “It's just a technical decision. After a forgettable first campaign which resulted in 14 sporadic appearances and three goals, Nkunku had been hoping to kickstart his Chelsea career under Maresca but the Italian coach opted to field Jackson as his first-choice striker in the league.

arts.ttl: 'Wild celebrations but Chelsea top-five bid still on knife edge'
arts.sum: The Blues earned an incredible comeback win at rivals Fulham but injuries, dropped players and goalless runs could still undermine Champions League qualification.

arts.ttl: What Levi Colwill had to tell Robert Sanchez to start doing just minutes into Fulham vs Chelsea - journalist
arts.sum: He's a nervous wreck at the minute 😵‍💫

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca explains why he didn't face up to Chelsea fans who demanded his sacking
arts.sum: Chelsea fans vented their fury at Enzo Maresca during their match at Fulham while they were trailing, only for the Blues to come from behind to win 2-1 thanks to Pedro Neto's injury time winner

arts.ttl: Chelsea sent furious Enzo Maresca sack demand midway through Fulham match
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca's relationship with Chelsea fans is deteriorating despite seeing his side claim a much-needed win at Fulham on Sunday thanks to Pedro Neto's last-gasp strike

arts.ttl: Absolute disaster for Chelsea straight after Fulham win as Enzo Maresca confirms injury for Blues man
